---
# Without an explicit index.qmd, Quarto auto-generates a redirect stub for
# the site root - confirmed NOT deterministic across environments: a local
# Windows render pointed it at manuscript.html, the same commit's CI
# (Ubuntu) build pointed it at supplementary/tables-mre.html instead, live
# on GitHub Pages. This file replaces that guesswork with an explicit,
# deterministic redirect. Not linked from the sidebar nav (like a scratch
# notebook) - it's just the / -> manuscript.html hop, not a page to browse.
title: "Redirecting to the manuscript…"
# html only - a raw <meta> redirect has no meaning in docx/typst, and
# there's no equivalent "site root" concept to redirect from in either.
# format: html here overrides the project-wide format: list (html + docx
# + typst) for just this one document.
format: html
---

<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=manuscript.html">

If you are not redirected automatically, [click here](manuscript.html).
